name: @nimblebraininc/workspace-tools
description: Git-backed workspace tools for AI agents: file ops, commits, search, and skill validation

repo_path.title: Repository Path
repo_path.description: Path to the git repository root

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read a file from the repo

tools.name: file_write
tools.description: Write content to a file (creates parents, stages)

tools.name: file_list
tools.description: List tracked files with optional filters

tools.name: file_delete
tools.description: Delete a file and stage the deletion

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Commit staged changes with secret scanning
